title: Cell Culture of 7721 or HeLa Cells
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iaqcadw

steps.title: Prepare RPMI 1640 medium (Gibco, USA)...
steps.instruction: Prepare RPMI 1640 medium (Gibco, USA) supplemented with 10% fetal bovine serum (Hyclone, USA) and 1% penicillin/streptomycin (Gibco, USA).

steps.title: Warm medium to 37℃ and bring 0
steps.instruction: Warm medium to 37℃ and bring 0.1% trypsin - ethylenediamine tetraacetic acid (EDTA) to room temperature.

steps.title: Observe cells under microscope to evaluate...
steps.instruction: Observe cells under microscope to evaluate cell confluency and presence of cell death.

steps.title: Aspirate out spent medium when the...
steps.instruction: Aspirate out spent medium when the cells reach approximately 90% confluency, and wash twice with PBS.

steps.title: Add 1 ml 0
steps.instruction: Add 1 ml 0.1% trypsin-EDTA to 10-cm culture dish, and ensure the entire surface of the dish is covered with 0.1% trypsin-EDTA. Incubate the cells at 37℃ for 2 minute.

steps.title: Observe cells under the microscope until...
steps.instruction: Observe cells under the microscope until the cells have been fully detached, then aspirate out the 0.1% trypsin-EDTA.

steps.title: Add 5 ml medium to the...
steps.instruction: Add 5 ml medium to the dish, gently pipet the cells, and harvest the cells by centrifugation at 1,000 rpm for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Aspirate out the medium, minding to...
steps.instruction: Aspirate out the medium, minding to not disrupt the cell pellet.

steps.title: Resuspend the cells in 2 ml...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cells in 2 ml medium and count with trypan blue.

steps.title: Seed the cells in 24-well plates...
steps.instruction: Seed the cells in 24-well plates at a density of 1x10 5 cells/500 μl. Culture cells under 5% CO 2 , in a 95% humidified atmosphere at 37℃.
